reach_why: Extends familiar critiques of search, language, and measurement; does not clearly open wholly unprecedented explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links lexical metrics, coherence filtering, institutional control, and measurement innovation under one fallibilist critique.
falsifiable_why: Testable via ablations, counterexamples, and cases where coherence filters improve novelty or verbal search yields new instruments.
explanation: Readable filters and word counts can hide real novelty, especially when innovation requires awkward forms or new measurements.
